page_shell.description: 每個 HTML 頁面的基本骨架，{{TITLE}} {{EXTRA_HEAD}} {{BODY}} 為佔位符
page_shell.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-TW">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>{{TITLE}} | FMTX AI 創新科技</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Noto+Sans+TC:wght@400;500;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  {{EXTRA_HEAD}}
</head>
<body>
  {{NAV}}
  <main>
    {{BODY}}
  </main>
  {{FOOTER}}
</body>
</html>

nav.description: 固定導覽列，{{NAV_ITEMS}} 替換為 <li> 清單
nav.html:
⬡ FMTX AI
    {{NAV_ITEMS}}

hero.description: 頁面頂部 Hero 區塊，{{HERO_TAG}} {{HERO_TITLE}} {{HERO_DESC}} {{HERO_CTA}} 為佔位符
hero.html:
